replace nullish coalescing with OR for Sentry config ( ) Sentry build ( ) Inject Sentry auth token as BuildKit secret in CI build pipelines Pass SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN via --secret to both myChip1 and CRM Docker builds Update Sentry plugin and source map integration (dev only) ( )

Item_Description: This pull request introduces updates to improve the integration and usage of Sentry within the build process and production environment. Key changes include
Status_Value: Enhancements to createSentryPlugin to support project-specific settings, hidden source maps, source map upload, and post-upload cleanup. Fixes for build configuration defaults, improved documentation, and alignment with code review feedback. Introduced a new feature to block source map file access in NGINX with a 404 response for added security. Update dependencies for maintenance ( ) Updated various dependencies to their latest versions for improved stability and compatibility. This is a routine maintenance update. Improve error handling and miscellaneous fixes ( ) Fix enum label retrieval and adjust Vite configuration (dev only) ( ) This pull request addresses an issue with part status retrieval by ensuring enum labels are fetched silently. Additionally, it updates the Vite configuration to set the default log level to 'warn' and disables the compressed size report, optimizing the development build process. There is explanation added in UI changes, so kept as is for understanding them There are few enhancements as well like "Improve error handling and miscellaneous fixes" regression/sanity related that area should be enough
